name: Facility Placement Optimization
prompt: Read grid.json describing a facility placement problem on an 8×8 grid. Place exactly 4 facilities to maximize total population covered. Constraints: (1) facilities cannot be placed on blocked cells, (2) facilities must be at least min_distance=2 apart (Manhattan distance), (3) each facility covers all cells within coverage_radius=2 (Manhattan distance). A cell's population is 'covered' if at least one facility is within radius. Write placement.json with: facilities (array of [row, col] positions), total_covered_population (number), coverage_map (8×8 array where 1=covered, 0=not).

criteria.description: No facility on a blocked cell
All facilities at least min_distance=2 apart
Coverage map matches facility positions and radius
Total covered population exceeds reasonable threshold

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
